executionRules.sphereMissionIndependence: Each sphere mission node must be executable standalone; cross-sphere coordination cannot introduce mandatory runtime dependencies.
executionRules.crossSphereCoordination: Use optional event-bus topics with per-sphere listeners. Mission anchors may publish and/or subscribe, but no direct hard dependency edge is allowed between sphere mission anchors unless explicitly documented and justified.

topics.description: Shared event topic for cross-sphere relay coordination without mandatory execution dependency.
